name: Count Control Legends
author: Poki
description: Count Control Legends is a fast-paced runner where math meets mayhem! Lead your stickman squad through gates that multiply, divide, add, or subtract your numbers, then crash through obstacles and crush enemy teams. Defeat the boss at the finish line, stack your crew into a mighty pyramid, and launch up the rainbow stairs for massive multipliers and huge rewards. Ready to count, conquer, and collect? How to play Count Control Legends? Swipe or drag left/right to move (desktop: A/D or Arrow Keys). Who created Count Control Legends? Count Control Legends is created by Jungle Tavern. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Count Control Legends for free? You can play Count Control Legends for free on Poki. Can I play Count Control Legends on mobile devices and desktop? Count Control Legends can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
